definitions.text: To hold up a claim emphatically.
examples: The defendant insisted on his innocence.
I insist that my secretary dresses nicely.

definitions.text: To demand continually that something happen or be done; to reiterate a demand despite requests to abandon it.
examples: The Prime Minister insisted on his Chancellor's resignation.
The Prime Minister insisted that his Chancellor resign.

definitions.text: To stand (on); to rest (upon); to lean (upon).
